content: Voice-to-voice latency dies mostly in turn-taking (endpointing silence threshold, typically tuned 300-600ms) and LLM TTFT (largest single component, 300-500ms+). STT/TTS first-byte are minor by comparison. A realistic 2026 budget: VAD 50 + STT 150 + LLM TTFT 400 + TTS 150 + network 50 = 800ms. Cross-datacenter round-trips between media host and inference vendors stack; co-locate. Streaming STT partials shave 200-400ms.
